subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou beholdest Thy lowly servant who hath believed in Thy manifest Light and hath been drawn unto the realms on high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی تری عبدک المسکین الذی آمن بنورک المبین و انجذب الی العلیین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
